name: hitl
description: HITL AI-Driven Development. Set up a project with /hitl:dev-start-from-prd, /hitl:dev-start-brownfield, or /hitl:dev-start-migration. Then run /hitl:dev-start-change to start work on an issue — it picks the workflow, shows the step plan, and drives the breadcrumb. Run /hitl:help to find the right command for any situation.
